pr.title: Non-record: M4 Air autoresearch bandit — mirrored recurrence + SwiGLU (val_bpb=1.9263)

output.summary: Runs an evolutionary bandit over Mac-suitable candidates, iteratively training mirrored-recurrence + SwiGLU configs within 10-min M4 Air slices for rapid tuning.
techniques: Evolutionary bandit candidate loop on Mac-specific subset
Mirrored recurrence reuses four blocks across eight logical layers
SwiGLU with extended warmdown tuned for short M4 Air runs
